authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: East Fork Carson River and tributaries above Carson Falls
East Fork Carson River, Hangman's Bridge to Nevada State Line

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(25) — Carson River, East Fork and tributaries
sources.quotedText: (25) Carson River, East Fork and tributaries (Alpine Co.). (A) Carson River, East Fork and tributaries above Carson Falls. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) Carson River, East Fork from Hangman's Bridge downstream to Nevada State Line. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. Minimum size limit: 14 inches total length. 2 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a)(4) — General possession limit provision for listed trout waters
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: Fly Fishing East Fork Carson River — Hangman's Bridge to Nevada Stateline
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 259721, "East Fork Carson River", Stream, Douglas Co. NV / Alpine Co. CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":259721,"gaz_name":"East Fork Carson River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"NV","county_name":"Douglas"/"Alpine","objectid_1":1030882,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13338817.4926, 4720346.1522 → 38.99075°N, 119.82464°W). This GNIS stream record files the whole East Fork Carson River under state_alpha=NV because its mouth (confluence with the West Fork, forming the main Carson River) lies in Douglas County, NV, roughly 34 km downstream of the CA-regulated Alpine County reach this file covers — so that mouth point is not used as water.lon/lat here (see wqp_ceden_hangmans_bridge).

groups.humanSummary: East Fork Carson River and tributaries (Alpine Co.): the headwaters above Carson Falls — a Lahontan cutthroat trout refuge — are closed to all fishing all year; the lower reach from Hangman's Bridge downstream to the Nevada state line is open all year, artificial-lures-only, with a 14-inch minimum size and a 2-trout limit.
groups.verbatimText: (25) Carson River, East Fork and tributaries (Alpine Co.). (A) Carson River, East Fork and tributaries above Carson Falls. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) Carson River, East Fork from Hangman's Bridge downstream to Nevada State Line. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. Minimum size limit: 14 inches total length. 2 trout

parameters.note: River and tributaries above Carson Falls, protecting a pure remnant Lahontan cutthroat trout population, closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year above Carson Falls (river and tributaries)
regulations.verbatimText: Carson River, East Fork and tributaries above Carson Falls. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year from Hangman's Bridge downstream to the Nevada state line
Only artificial lures may be used, Hangman's Bridge to Nevada state line
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: 14-inch minimum total length, Hangman's Bridge to Nevada state line
regulations.verbatimText: Minimum size limit: 14 inches total length.

parameters.counting_rule: Possession limit equals the daily bag limit (1x) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a)(4): unless otherwise provided, no more than one daily bag limit may be possessed.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit, Hangman's Bridge to Nevada state line

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Carson River East Fork (Alpine Co.) for super-catchable Lahontan Cutthroat Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of May-October. Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Carson River East Fork (Alpine Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of May-October. Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.
